title: Rectifiable curves in proximally smooth sets
abstract: We provide an algorithm of constructing a rectifiable curve between two sufficiently close points of a proximally smooth set in a uniformly convex and uniformly smooth Banach space. Our algorithm returns a reasonably short curve between two sufficiently close points of a proximally smooth set, is iterative and uses a certain modification of the metric projection. We estimate the length of a constructed curve and its deviation from the segment with the same endpoints. These estimates coincide up to a constant factor with those for the geodesics in a proximally smooth set in a Hilbert space.
